title: Lifetime awards for stalwarts of mini cricket programme
description: GARDENROUTE NEWS - Six stalwarts of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDENROUTE NEWS - Six stalwarts of the successful mini cricket programme of South Western Districts Cricket (SWDC) were honoured with lifetime achievement awards at the recent SWD Cricket Annual Awards function.","html":"GARDENROUTE NEWS - Six stalwarts of the successful mini cricket programme of South Western Districts Cricket (SWDC) were honoured with lifetime achievement awards at the recent SWD Cricket Annual Awards function."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They are Regina Wicomb (30 years; Oudtshoorn), Glenda Stalmeester (20 years; Dysselsdorp), Shireen Noble (30 years; Pacaltsdorp), Merlin Masimela (SWDC KFC Mini Cricket co-ordinator), Felicity Prins (20 years; Oudtshoorn), Lavona Cloete (20 years; Hessequa) and Meryl Daniels (20 years; Zoar, Kannaland).","html":"They are Regina Wicomb (30 years; Oudtshoorn), Glenda Stalmeester (20 years; Dysselsdorp), Shireen Noble (30 years; Pacaltsdorp), Merlin Masimela (SWDC KFC Mini Cricket co-ordinator), Felicity Prins (20 years; Oudtshoorn), Lavona Cloete (20 years; Hessequa) and Meryl Daniels (20 years; Zoar, Kannaland)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Lifetime awards for stalwarts of mini cricket programme
